title: Institute of Culinary Education ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] The Institute of Culinary Education (ICE) is a reputable culinary school based in New York City, USA. Founded in 1975, ICE offers a wide range of professional certificate programs in culinary arts, pastry & baking, hospitality management, and culinary technology, among others. The Institute is known for its modern facilities, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections.
